g.text: The 1/3 is only a placement count. It does not partition the hardware:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: with one actor on the card, it can use all the GPU's memory and compute.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Fitting the roles in memory is handled a layer up: offload weights/optimizer

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: while a role is idle and the actor and rollout phases do not run at the same instant.
